name: Qibu Co.,Ltd.
summary: Qibu Co.,Ltd. engages in the design, development, production, and sale of children's shoes, children's wear, and children's clothing accessories under the ABC KIDS brand name primarily in China. It also operates approximately 2,000 sales outlets. The company is based in Lishui, China. As of October 28, 2020, Qibu Co.,Ltd. operates as a prior subsidiary of Hong Kong Qibu International Group Limited.
